issues.description: Card has activation text but effects array is empty. Missing complete DSL implementation for: Activate Main phase ability that swaps base power between 2 selected Supernovas or Heart Pirates Characters during this turn.
Missing trigger: Activated (for Activate: Main). Missing condition: Once Per Turn. Missing actions: SelectTarget (2 Characters with type filter) and PowerSwap or equivalent mechanic.
'during this turn' → duration must be 'DuringYourTurn', not Permanent or EndOfTurn

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Select 2 of your {Supernovas} or {Heart Pirates} type Characters. Swap the base power of the selected Characters with each other during this turn.
